description: Filmmaker Kunal Kohli strongly defends Ranveer Singh, urging audiences to look beyond box office numbers. He emphasizes that every actor faces hits and flops, and setbacks don't define a performer's talent. Kohli highlighted Singh's brilliant performances even in films that didn't succeed, advocating for a more nuanced view of stardom and failure. Read on to know more in detail.

Watch: Kavya Maran greets Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after SRH exit IPL 2026
description: Kavya Maran’s post-match greeting for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi went viral after Rajasthan Royals defeated Sunrisers Hyderabad by 47 runs in the IPL 2026 Eliminator. The 15-year-old smashed 97 off 29 balls with 12 sixes, helping RR post 243/8. Jofra Archer starred with the ball as SRH were bowled out for 196. Rajasthan Royals now face Gujarat Titans in Qualifier 2.

title: Sooryavanshi 'doesn't give a damn about any bowler': Jurel reveals mantra
description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive 97 off 29 balls powered Rajasthan Royals to a 47-run victory over Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL 2026 Eliminator. Teammate Dhruv Jurel revealed the 15-year-old's fearless approach, emphasizing his focus solely on the ball, not the bowler. This win propels RR closer to the IPL title.

description: Meta has initiated another round of significant layoffs, impacting nearly 8,000 employees globally, with notifications starting in Singapore. While many are let go, over 7,000 will transition to AI initiatives. The company is providing immigration guidance and severance packages, including 16 weeks' pay plus two weeks per service year, and 18 months of COBRA coverage for affected staff.

title: 2 suspected Ebola cases trigger airport surveillance, quarantine measures across nation
description: Following reports of suspected Ebola infections in Bengaluru and Gujarat, Indian health officials have intensified surveillance at airports and introduced stringent quarantine measures. A Ugandan woman has fortunately tested negative in Bengaluru, while a 37-year-old man in Gujarat is currently being watched closely after traveling from Africa and Bangladesh.

description: In a notable crackdown, the Central Bureau of Investigation detained a paediatrician from Latur and a physics teacher from Pune linked to the NEET-UG 2026 examination leak. This surge in arrests now totals 13 individuals. Investigators revealed a web of WhatsApp communications and financial exchanges indicating that the leaked physics questions were sold to affluent families for substantial payments.

title: Dark seas, floating drug bags, foreign smugglers: Inside Gujarat’s biggest cocaine bust
description: Gujarat ATS and Coast Guard seized 115kg of cocaine worth Rs 1,150 crore from a cargo vessel near Mundra port, a major maritime anti-narcotics operation. Three foreign nationals were arrested, while one Tanzanian national is feared drowned after jumping into the sea. The drugs originated in Brazil and were destined for Delhi.
